features.name: fork-join_none with delayed task call
features.description: Code should include a fork-join_none block containing a task call with delay (#)

features.name: fork-join_any with delayed task call
features.description: Code should include a fork-join_any block containing a task call with delay (#)

features.name: sequential fork blocks with different join types
features.description: Code should include sequential fork blocks where the first uses join_none and the second uses join_any

features.name: task with delay inside fork
features.description: Code should include a task containing a delay statement (#) called from within a fork-join block
features.snippet:
task foo; #1000; endtask
fork foo; join_none
